description.content: Operations for managing permission profiles
Retrieves all permission profiles defined for a specific workspace. Permission profiles define sets of capabilities and access levels that can be assigned to users.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the workspace.

response.name: Successful response containing permission profiles.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the workspace.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

The Gong Permissions API manages access controls through permission profiles and user call access assignments, enabling programmatic configuration of who can access specific calls and features.
